overall.description: A third-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character moving through a green beaded curtain entrance into a food stall area, then slowly orbiting around a vendor NPC standing behind a service counter. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics with neon lighting, metal grating, and industrial materials.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market entrance corridor with beaded curtain

events.description: passing through the green beaded curtain from entrance into the interior space

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the narrow entrance corridor toward the food stall counter

entered.detail: hanging curtain made of green metallic discs separating entrance from interior
metal service counter with glass display case and illuminated interior
opening to exterior with bright daylight streaming in

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow entrance corridor toward a food stall, passing through a distinctive green beaded curtain. The space transitions from natural daylight at the entrance to artificial lighting inside, with the service counter becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall interior with service counter and kitchen storage

events.description: camera begins slowly circling around the vendor NPC to view from different angles
camera moves to darker side of stall revealing neon lighting and metal grating details

agents.ego_description: slowly circling around the food vendor, examining him and the stall interior from multiple angles

notable_agents.action: food vendor wearing yellow vest with graphics and white headband, leaning on counter and looking around the stall

entered.detail: stacked cylindrical metal barrels behind the service counter
diamond-pattern metal mesh fencing on walls separating spaces
illuminated vending machine with colorful digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around a vendor NPC standing behind a food stall counter, revealing the industrial cyberpunk interior with metal barrels, neon signage, and metal grating. The vendor remains stationary, leaning on the counter as the camera completes a slow orbit showing different angles of the stall and its equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright outdoor entrance into the neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk food stall. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor, passing through a green beaded curtain as the natural daylight fades into artificial illumination. As the camera enters the stall area, the view opens up to reveal a service counter and a stationary vendor NPC. The scene then shifts into a slow, orbiting motion around the vendor, gradually unveiling the industrial surroundings filled with metal barrels, neon signage, and metal grating.
